detail.description: Patrick Wisdom grounds out, second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Cole Young to 3rd. Dominic Canzone to 2nd.
Patrick Wisdom homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field. Dominic Canzone scores.
Patrick Wisdom singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Tommy Troy.
Patrick Wisdom flies out to right fielder Jarred Kelenic.
Patrick Wisdom doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Randy Arozarena scores.
Patrick Wisdom flies out sharply to right fielder Jarred Kelenic.
Patrick Wisdom pops out to second baseman Chase Meidroth.
Patrick Wisdom grounds into a force out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth. Julio Rodríguez scores. Randy Arozarena to 3rd. Josh Naylor out at 2nd. Patrick Wisdom to 1st.
Patrick Wisdom flies out sharply to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Patrick Wisdom flies out to right fielder Tyler O'Neill.
Patrick Wisdom singles on a ground ball to left fielder Colton Cowser. Josh Naylor to 2nd.
Patrick Wisdom grounds out to first baseman Pete Alonso. Josh Naylor to 3rd.
Patrick Wisdom flies out to left fielder Taylor Ward.
Patrick Wisdom flies out sharply to right fielder Leody Taveras.
Patrick Wisdom flies out to right fielder Leody Taveras.
Patrick Wisdom singles on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene.
Patrick Wisdom grounds out, second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Patrick Wisdom lines out sharply to center fielder Matt Vierling.
Patrick Wisdom grounds out, first baseman Spencer Torkelson to pitcher Will Vest.
Patrick Wisdom pops out to second baseman Gleyber Torres.
Patrick Wisdom pops out to second baseman Michael Massey in foul territory.
Patrick Wisdom pops out to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.
Patrick Wisdom flies out sharply to right fielder Dylan Crews.
